title: elymus remotiflorus
intro: Elymus remotiflorus, also known as the Chinese wildrye or wild wheatgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-viral activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Elymus remotiflorus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and sore throat.
